title: Intro to Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn
desc: A practical workshop covering supervised learning, model evaluation, and pipeline building using Python's Scikit-Learn library. Participants built their first ML pipeline from scratch.

title: Apache Spark for Large-Scale Data Processing
desc: Hands-on session on distributed data processing using Apache Spark, covering RDDs, DataFrames, and Spark SQL with real datasets.

title: Python for Data Science Bootcamp
desc: A two-day intensive workshop covering NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and data wrangling techniques for beginners.

title: Git & GitHub for Collaborative Projects
desc: Introduction to version control, branching strategies, and collaborative workflows using Git and GitHub.

title: Hadoop Ecosystem Overview
desc: Introduction to HDFS, MapReduce, Hive, and Pig for big data storage and processing at scale.

title: Deep Learning with TensorFlow
desc: Hands-on workshop covering neural networks, CNNs, and RNNs using TensorFlow and Keras.
